A Hands-On Guide to Adding Google reCAPTCHA v3 to Your Project
Block bot signups and spam with Google reCAPTCHA v3 — the newer version with no 'I am not a robot' checkbox. From getting the site key to wiring both ends up.
Stop Letting Them Quietly Collect My Data — Disabling Personalized Ads on Google and Facebook

Heads up — this isn't a "block all ads" post. It's a "limit how much these platforms quietly collect about you" post. Covers Google's ad personalization controls (the activity controls + ad settings page), my actual recommendation (counterintuitively — keep personalization on but tune it), and Facebook's privacy checkup for hiding specific advertisers and topics.
Core Web Vitals for SEO: LCP, FID, and CLS

Heads-up that this post is from 2021 — Google replaced FID with INP in March 2024. The general framing still applies. Originally written when I noticed my Google Search Console flagging my site with bad "page experience" scores — turns out Google's Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS) had been quietly added in 2020 and started factoring into SEO. This post is a quick tour of the three metrics, their thresholds, and how to test your site.
How to Increase Your Google AdSense Revenue (Placement Tips)

A short notes post on the small things that move the needle on blog AdSense revenue — mostly about ad placement. Covers picking the right ad type (responsive Display ads), how many ads is too many, slots that are reliably visible (sidebar, article top, article bottom), and the two Google AdSense rules you should never break (no asking users to click, no clicking your own ads).
